subcodes.first_line: O thou who art young in spirit! Thy sugar-shedding words, and the traces of thy musk-laden pen were perused and recited
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان روحانی نامه شیرینت و بیان شکرینت و اثر خامه مشکینت قرائت و تلاوت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
